title: hieracium acutangulum
intro: Hieracium acutangulum, also known as sharp-stemmed hawkweed, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Hieracium acutangulum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, Hieracium acutangulum is often dried and used as a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
